input.user_input: What triggers a mandatory disclosure obligation under HIPAA when a covered entity discovers a data breach?

actual:
Under the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) Breach Notification Rule (45 CFR §§ 164.400-414), a mandatory disclosure (notification) obligation is triggered when a covered entity discovers a **breach of unsecured protected health information (PHI)**.
